Opcode.name: PCM_OP_INV_VIEW_INVOICE
Opcode.Doc:
This opcode retrieves an invoice from the database. It uses the poid of the /bill object or /invoice object to locate and retrieve a specific invoice and the PIN_FLD_THRESHOLD value to determine the maximum allowable size of the invoice to be viewed.
The PIN_FLD_FLAGS value in the output flist determines the type of invoice to view, for example a summary or detailed invoice for a non-hierarchical account. The PIN_FLD_INV_SIZE value in the output flist specifies the size of the invoice returned.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: This represents either an invoice or a bill poid.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_THRESHOLD_UPPER
Decimal.Doc: This indicates the threshold size (in KB) for viewing the invoice.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE_STR
String.Doc: This is the requested invoice format type, specified as a mime type. If it is not specified, all formats in the invoice object will be returned. Available format types are HTML, XML, DOC1 and plain text.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: This is the returned invoice Poid. If the invoice is subclassed, additional fields may be returned below.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_INV_FLAGS
Enum.Doc: This determines what kind of invoice will be created. The default value is set to PIN_INV_TYPE_DETAIL.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILL_OBJ
Poid.Doc: This is the bill object poid associated with this invoice.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_CREATED_T
Timestamp.Doc: This is the time that bill object was created.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_MOD_T
Timestamp.Doc: This is the time that bill object was modified.

String.name: PIN_FLD_READ_ACCESS
String.Doc: Read Access level for object. Valid values are S(Self), G(Global), L(BrandLineage), B(BrandGroup), A(Ancestral).

String.name: PIN_FLD_WRITE_ACCESS
String.Doc: Write Access level for object. Valid values are S(Self), G(Global), L(BrandLineage), B(BrandGroup), A(Ancestral).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_BILL_DATE_T
Timestamp.Doc: This shows the date that the bill was created.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CHECK_SPLIT_FLAGS
Int.Doc: In case of hierarchical accounts set the check_split_flag. This flag is used to decide whether to stich invoices later

Array.name: PIN_FLD_STATUSES
Array.Doc: This array holds the statuses of the returned invoice.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_EFFECTIVE_T
Timestamp.Doc: This shows the time that the status was created.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_FORMATS
Array.Doc: The requested format will be returned based on what user has specifed in TYPE_STR of the input flist. If user didn't specify the format then it will retrieve the format that the policy opcode has specifed.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_INV_SIZE
Decimal.Doc: This is the size (in KB) of returned invoice.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE_STR
String.Doc: This shows the type of invoice format that is being returned: XML, HTML, DOC1 and plain text.

String.name: PIN_FLD_LOCALE
String.Doc: This is an optional locale information used during formatting.

Buf.name: PIN_FLD_BUFFER
Buf.Doc: The output buffer containing invoice information. The xerces XML validation parser expects a max of 2GB.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Enum.Doc: If there is no matching invoice or no format is found, the result will be PIN_RESULT_FAIL. Otherwise the result will be PIN_RESULT_PASS.

Values.Doc: The formatting operation was not sucessful.(PIN_RESULT_FAIL)

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
